overview.name: Auth JWT Repeat Variations
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow inside repeat block using variations.
Test flow includes: 1. Authenticate via auth tag. 2. Execute repeat block for each variation row. 3. Create protected resource using variation values. 4. Verify create response = 200 for each iteration. 5. Retrieve all protected resources after repeat execution. 6. Verify that all variation resources were created. 7. Reset JWT auth state.
This scenario validates: - JWT authentication wrapping repeat command - Repeated execution with variation data - Correct interpolation of variation values - Resource accumulation across all iterations - Stable repeated auth execution

repeat.comment: Create protected resource for each variation

http.comment: Verify that all repeated variation resources were created
Reset JWT auth state after test
